title: Dimensions & Dungeons
description: Explore a new world full of undiscovered possibilities, with new dimensions, bosses, mobs and structures.
body:
Explore a new world full of undiscovered possibilities, with new dimensions, bosses, mobs and structures. This mod is waiting for you to start an incredible journey!

Please be aware that this mod is in alpha so expect bugs and unfinished features. We will keep updating the mod with time so stay tuned for updates.

**This mod requires Geckolib to function properly.**



# **FINISHED FEATURES:**

**Eternal Forest Dimension:**

- **New Biomes:** Eternal Forest and Small Forest Biome, Eternal Dark Forest and Small Dark Forest Biome, the Eternal Desert Biome, Amethyst Grottoes, Amazonian Hollows, Caverns of Hell and more...
- **New Mobs:** Magic Fairy, Woodsper Monster, Friendly Goblin, Crystal Golem and new bosses.
- **New important items:** New keys for dimensional travel, a dimensional reverser to go back to the overworld and a huge variety of new minerals and their respective armor and tools.
- **New structures:**  A bigger and harder dungeon, Goblin huts, a mysterious massive tree and new desert pyramids.
- **New flowers:** Purple allium, light blue orchid, pink cactus flower and pink lily of the valley.
- **New food:** Purple Berry, Eternal apple and glowsapple.
# **UPCOMING FEATURES:**

**One new dimensions:** The Hot Plains.

**New useful items.**

**New foods.**

**New building blocks.**

**New mobs.**

**New structures.**

**New biomes.**

# **GUIDE**

First, you have to find the new hard dungeon underground and loot the chests to get 4 **Eternal Forest key fragments**.

These fragments are essential for crafting the **key** for the Eternal Forest dimension.

**CRAFTING RECIPE:**

![Eternal Forest Key Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/995072b1ad310164d09cdd9a5fe3d9102c123a3c.png)

This key isnt useful by itself, to make it properly usable you need to craft the **Dimensional Traveller**.

**CRAFTING RECIPE:**

![Dimensional Traveller Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cafb2c09745707f26a0104c044e3df51e71c77a5.png)

With the key, you have to right click on the **Dimensional Traveller** to activate the portal to the **Eternal Forest dimension**. To travel to the dimension, you need a **ender eye** on your main hand and right click on the activated Dimension Traveller.

To go back to the overworld, you need to craft the **Dimensional Reverser**.

**CRAFTING RECIPE:**

![Dimensional Reverser Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cb9c517c5dd560e4d14c6e8731564ea8b1505db.png)

To use it,  you just have to right click, and you will go back to the overworld.
